name: GT-end-banach
source: Kitaev arXiv:2405.02434, refs/kitaev-2405.02434/approximate_algebras.tex:638-642: for a Banach space calA, the bounded linear operators on calA with the operator norm form a (unital) Banach algebra. Instantiated at calA=B(H)_sa (GT-bhsa-complete) -> End(B(H)_sa) is a unital Banach algebra.
